changelog: ROOT CAUSE: tvHubContentFocus had a page-level focusRestorer that hijacked the rail's RIGHT-exit requestFocus() when the user had slide-navigated between home pages — the saved pivot pointed at a removed composable. Removed the page-level focusRestorer; intra-row focus memory still works via the row-level focusMod.

Discovery only worked before because it was the default landing page (no slide-navigation = pivot still valid). Every other page that you reached via UP/DOWN had a stale pivot, which is why ONLY Discovery worked.
All previous features preserved: Continue Watching as default first home page, Themes & Moods row above Decades, Tag-based release rollback infrastructure.
